senses.meaningEN: sure of yourself or something

d09-confident.usageNote: confident 形容人或判断；confidence 是名词。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Mina felt confident after practising her presentation twice.
examples.translationCN: 米娜练习两遍演讲后感到很自信。
examples.speakText: Mina felt confident after practising her presentation twice.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Elizabeth Bennet remained confident in her own judgment despite Darcy's rank.
examples.translationCN: 尽管达西地位显赫，伊丽莎白·班纳特仍相信自己的判断。
examples.speakText: Elizabeth Bennet remained confident in her own judgment despite Darcy's rank.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Scientists are increasingly confident that rapid emission cuts can limit future warming.
examples.translationCN: 近年科学家越来越确信，快速减排能够限制未来变暖。
examples.speakText: Scientists are increasingly confident that rapid emission cuts can limit future warming.

senses.meaningEN: worried or strongly wanting something

d09-anxious.usageNote: anxious about 表示担忧；anxious to do 可表示急切想做。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Many students feel anxious about choosing a major.
examples.translationCN: 许多学生对选择专业感到焦虑。
examples.speakText: Many students feel anxious about choosing a major.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Pip was anxious to become a gentleman, yet uncertain about the cost.
examples.translationCN: 匹普急切想成为绅士，却不确定要付出什么代价。
examples.speakText: Pip was anxious to become a gentleman, yet uncertain about the cost.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Young workers in many cities are anxious about housing costs.
examples.translationCN: 近年许多城市的年轻劳动者为住房成本感到焦虑。
examples.speakText: Young workers in many cities are anxious about housing costs.

senses.meaningEN: eager to know something or unusual

d09-curious.usageNote: curious about 表示对某事好奇；curious 也可表示奇怪的。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Curious students asked how the experiment had been designed.
examples.translationCN: 好奇的学生询问实验是如何设计的。
examples.speakText: Curious students asked how the experiment had been designed.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Alice grew curious when the White Rabbit hurried past with a watch.
examples.translationCN: 白兔带着手表匆匆跑过时，爱丽丝产生了好奇心。
examples.speakText: Alice grew curious when the White Rabbit hurried past with a watch.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Astronomers are curious about the chemistry of newly observed exoplanet atmospheres.
examples.translationCN: 近年天文学家对新观测到的系外行星大气成分很好奇。
examples.speakText: Astronomers are curious about the chemistry of newly observed exoplanet atmospheres.

senses.meaningEN: careful to avoid danger or mistakes

d09-cautious.usageNote: cautious 形容人或做法；caution 是名词或动词。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The research team was cautious about drawing conclusions from one survey.
examples.translationCN: 研究团队谨慎对待仅凭一次调查得出结论。
examples.speakText: The research team was cautious about drawing conclusions from one survey.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Bilbo took a cautious step into the dark passage beneath the mountain.
examples.translationCN: 比尔博谨慎地踏入山下的黑暗通道。
examples.speakText: Bilbo took a cautious step into the dark passage beneath the mountain.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Central banks have remained cautious while inflation pressures change.
examples.translationCN: 近年在通胀压力变化之际，各国央行一直保持谨慎。
examples.speakText: Central banks have remained cautious while inflation pressures change.

senses.meaningEN: knowing about a fact or situation

d09-aware.usageNote: aware 通常作表语，用 be aware of 或 be aware that。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Students should be aware of the deadline for course changes.
examples.translationCN: 学生应了解更改课程的截止日期。
examples.speakText: Students should be aware of the deadline for course changes.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Jane Eyre became aware that silence would cost her self-respect.
examples.translationCN: 简·爱意识到沉默会让她失去自尊。
examples.speakText: Jane Eyre became aware that silence would cost her self-respect.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Consumers are more aware of how data is collected by mobile applications.
examples.translationCN: 近年消费者更加了解移动应用如何收集数据。
examples.speakText: Consumers are more aware of how data is collected by mobile applications.

senses.meaningEN: having the ability needed to do something

d09-capable.usageNote: capable 后用 of doing，不用 capable to do。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The software is capable of analysing thousands of responses.
examples.translationCN: 该软件能够分析数千份答复。
examples.speakText: The software is capable of analysing thousands of responses.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Jo March proved capable of supporting herself through writing.
examples.translationCN: 乔·马奇证明自己能够靠写作独立生活。
examples.speakText: Jo March proved capable of supporting herself through writing.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Modern language models are capable of producing fluent text but can still make factual errors.
examples.translationCN: 现代语言模型能生成流畅文本，但仍可能出现事实错误。
examples.speakText: Modern language models are capable of producing fluent text but can still make factual errors.

senses.meaningEN: able to be trusted or depended on

d09-reliable.usageNote: reliable 可形容人、设备或信息，强调始终可信。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Use reliable sources when preparing an academic report.
examples.translationCN: 准备学术报告时要使用可靠来源。
examples.speakText: Use reliable sources when preparing an academic report.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Watson remained a reliable companion through Holmes's most dangerous cases.
examples.translationCN: 在福尔摩斯最危险的案件中，华生始终是可靠伙伴。
examples.speakText: Watson remained a reliable companion through Holmes's most dangerous cases.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Reliable electricity storage is essential for grids using more wind and solar power.
examples.translationCN: 对更多使用风能和太阳能的电网而言，可靠储能至关重要。
examples.speakText: Reliable electricity storage is essential for grids using more wind and solar power.

senses.meaningEN: free from outside control or support

d09-independent.usageNote: independent 常接 of；表示国家独立常用 independence from。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Group projects should still develop each student's independent thinking.
examples.translationCN: 小组项目仍应培养每位学生的独立思考。
examples.speakText: Group projects should still develop each student's independent thinking.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Jane Eyre sought an independent life founded on work and dignity.
examples.translationCN: 简·爱追求建立在劳动与尊严之上的独立生活。
examples.speakText: Jane Eyre sought an independent life founded on work and dignity.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Independent researchers help test major claims about artificial intelligence systems.
examples.translationCN: 近年独立研究人员帮助检验有关人工智能系统的重要主张。
examples.speakText: Independent researchers help test major claims about artificial intelligence systems.

senses.meaningEN: successful in producing a result; officially operating

d09-effective.usageNote: effective 强调产生预期效果；efficient 强调少浪费资源。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Regular review is more effective than studying everything at once.
examples.translationCN: 定期复习比一次学完所有内容更有效。
examples.speakText: Regular review is more effective than studying everything at once.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Scheherazade found an effective way to delay the king's cruel decision.
examples.translationCN: 山鲁佐德找到了一种有效方法来推迟国王残酷的决定。
examples.speakText: Scheherazade found an effective way to delay the king's cruel decision.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Wastewater monitoring has become an effective tool for tracking infectious diseases.
examples.translationCN: 近年废水监测已成为追踪传染病的有效工具。
examples.speakText: Wastewater monitoring has become an effective tool for tracking infectious diseases.

senses.meaningEN: able to change easily or bend without breaking

d09-flexible.usageNote: flexible 可形容安排能调整，也可形容材料可弯曲。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: A flexible timetable helps students balance work and study.
examples.translationCN: 灵活的时间表帮助学生平衡工作与学习。
examples.speakText: A flexible timetable helps students balance work and study.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Odysseus survived because his plans were flexible when circumstances changed.
examples.translationCN: 奥德修斯能生存下来，是因为情况变化时他的计划很灵活。
examples.speakText: Odysseus survived because his plans were flexible when circumstances changed.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Flexible work arrangements remain common in many technology companies.
examples.translationCN: 近年灵活工作安排在许多科技公司仍很常见。
examples.speakText: Flexible work arrangements remain common in many technology companies.

senses.meaningEN: continuing or staying at the same level

d09-constant.usageNote: constant 可表示持续不断，也可表示数值恒定。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The experiment kept the room temperature constant.
examples.translationCN: 实验使室温保持恒定。
examples.speakText: The experiment kept the room temperature constant.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Penelope's constant hope endured through the long years of waiting.
examples.translationCN: 在漫长等待中，珀涅罗珀始终怀有希望。
examples.speakText: Penelope's constant hope endured through the long years of waiting.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Constant monitoring helps engineers detect changes in bridges and dams.
examples.translationCN: 持续监测帮助工程师发现桥梁和大坝的变化。
examples.speakText: Constant monitoring helps engineers detect changes in bridges and dams.

senses.meaningEN: not likely to change, move, or fail

d09-stable.usageNote: stable 强调状态不易突然变化；steady 常强调平稳连续。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The patient's condition remained stable throughout the night.
examples.translationCN: 病人的状况整夜保持稳定。
examples.speakText: The patient's condition remained stable throughout the night.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The farm gave the animals a stable routine before its rules began to change.
examples.translationCN: 在规则开始改变前，农场给动物们提供了稳定的日常生活。
examples.speakText: The farm gave the animals a stable routine before its rules began to change.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Grid operators use batteries to keep electricity supplies stable during demand peaks.
examples.translationCN: 近年电网运营方使用电池在需求高峰期保持供电稳定。
examples.speakText: Grid operators use batteries to keep electricity supplies stable during demand peaks.

senses.meaningEN: very serious, harsh, or intense

d09-severe.usageNote: severe 可形容问题严重、天气恶劣或惩罚严厉。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The storm caused severe damage to the campus roof.
examples.translationCN: 暴风雨严重损坏了校园屋顶。
examples.speakText: The storm caused severe damage to the campus roof.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The severe rules at Lowood made Jane's childhood even harder.
examples.translationCN: 洛伍德学校严苛的规则让简的童年更加艰难。
examples.speakText: The severe rules at Lowood made Jane's childhood even harder.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Several regions have faced severe water shortages after repeated droughts.
examples.translationCN: 近年一些地区因反复干旱而面临严重缺水。
examples.speakText: Several regions have faced severe water shortages after repeated droughts.

senses.meaningEN: small or less important

d09-minor.usageNote: minor 与 major 相对；表示未成年人时也可作名词。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The draft needs only minor changes before submission.
examples.translationCN: 这份草稿提交前只需做小幅修改。
examples.speakText: The draft needs only minor changes before submission.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: A minor misunderstanding grew into a serious quarrel between the families.
examples.translationCN: 一个小误会演变成两家之间的严重争吵。
examples.speakText: A minor misunderstanding grew into a serious quarrel between the families.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Software teams release minor updates to fix security weaknesses and improve stability.
examples.translationCN: 近年软件团队通过小版本更新修复安全漏洞并提高稳定性。
examples.speakText: Software teams release minor updates to fix security weaknesses and improve stability.

senses.meaningEN: made of many connected parts and difficult to understand

d09-complex.usageNote: complex 强调多部分相互联系；complicated 常强调难以处理。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The diagram makes a complex process easier to understand.
examples.translationCN: 这张图使复杂过程更容易理解。
examples.speakText: The diagram makes a complex process easier to understand.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Hamlet faced a complex choice involving duty, evidence, and revenge.
examples.translationCN: 哈姆雷特面对一个涉及责任、证据和复仇的复杂选择。
examples.speakText: Hamlet faced a complex choice involving duty, evidence, and revenge.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Global semiconductor supply chains remain complex and highly interconnected.
examples.translationCN: 近年全球半导体供应链仍然复杂且高度互联。
examples.speakText: Global semiconductor supply chains remain complex and highly interconnected.

senses.meaningEN: normal and not unusual or special

d09-ordinary.usageNote: ordinary 强调没有特殊之处；usual 强调经常发生。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: An ordinary conversation can reveal important cultural differences.
examples.translationCN: 一次普通对话也能揭示重要的文化差异。
examples.speakText: An ordinary conversation can reveal important cultural differences.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Bilbo's ordinary morning ended when unexpected guests filled his home.
examples.translationCN: 不速之客挤满家门后，比尔博平常的早晨结束了。
examples.speakText: Bilbo's ordinary morning ended when unexpected guests filled his home.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Smartphone cameras now let ordinary users record events in remarkable detail.
examples.translationCN: 如今智能手机相机让普通用户也能细致记录事件。
examples.speakText: Smartphone cameras now let ordinary users record events in remarkable detail.

senses.meaningEN: unusual and worthy of attention

d09-remarkable.usageNote: remarkable 表示值得注意或非凡；remark 是“评论”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The class made remarkable progress in academic writing.
examples.translationCN: 全班在学术写作方面取得了显著进步。
examples.speakText: The class made remarkable progress in academic writing.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Helen Keller made remarkable progress after language opened the world to her.
examples.translationCN: 语言为海伦·凯勒打开世界后，她取得了非凡进步。
examples.speakText: Helen Keller made remarkable progress after language opened the world to her.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Recent vaccines were developed with remarkable speed through global scientific cooperation.
examples.translationCN: 近年的疫苗在全球科学合作下以非凡速度研发出来。
examples.speakText: Recent vaccines were developed with remarkable speed through global scientific cooperation.

senses.meaningEN: official or following accepted rules

d09-formal.usageNote: formal 可指正式场合、官方程序或规范教育。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Applicants receive a formal offer by email after the interview.
examples.translationCN: 申请者面试后会通过邮件收到正式录取通知。
examples.speakText: Applicants receive a formal offer by email after the interview.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Darcy's formal manner initially concealed the strength of his feelings.
examples.translationCN: 达西正式拘谨的举止起初掩盖了他的强烈感情。
examples.speakText: Darcy's formal manner initially concealed the strength of his feelings.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Several governments have begun formal negotiations on rules for artificial intelligence.
examples.translationCN: 近年多个政府已开始就人工智能规则展开正式谈判。
examples.speakText: Several governments have begun formal negotiations on rules for artificial intelligence.

senses.meaningEN: relaxed and not official

d09-informal.usageNote: informal 表示非正式但不等于不认真或不礼貌。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The tutor held an informal discussion after class.
examples.translationCN: 导师课后组织了一次非正式讨论。
examples.speakText: The tutor held an informal discussion after class.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The pilgrims shared stories in an informal contest during their journey.
examples.translationCN: 朝圣者们在旅途中以非正式比赛的方式分享故事。
examples.speakText: The pilgrims shared stories in an informal contest during their journey.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Informal online communities often help programmers solve technical problems quickly.
examples.translationCN: 近年非正式网络社群常帮助程序员快速解决技术问题。
examples.speakText: Informal online communities often help programmers solve technical problems quickly.

senses.meaningCN: 遥远的；远程的；可能性小的
senses.meaningEN: far away, operated at a distance, or unlikely

d09-remote.usageNote: remote 可表示地理遥远、远程控制，也可说 a remote chance“极小可能”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Remote access allows students to use the library database from home.
examples.translationCN: 远程访问让学生能在家使用图书馆数据库。
examples.speakText: Remote access allows students to use the library database from home.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Heathcliff grew up in a remote house surrounded by open moorland.
examples.translationCN: 希斯克利夫在荒原包围的偏远宅邸中长大。
examples.speakText: Heathcliff grew up in a remote house surrounded by open moorland.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Low-orbit satellites are expanding internet access in some remote communities.
examples.translationCN: 近年低轨卫星正在扩大部分偏远社区的互联网接入。
examples.speakText: Low-orbit satellites are expanding internet access in some remote communities.

senses.meaningEN: to state as true or ask for what is owed
a statement or demand for a right

d10-claim.usageNote: claim 表示声称时不保证内容属实；claim damages 表示索赔。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The article claims that online study always saves time.
examples.translationCN: 文章声称在线学习总能节省时间。
examples.speakText: The article claims that online study always saves time.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The stranger claimed knowledge of secrets hidden in the old house.
examples.translationCN: 陌生人声称知道老宅中隐藏的秘密。
examples.speakText: The stranger claimed knowledge of secrets hidden in the old house.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Independent laboratories test company claims about the performance of new batteries.
examples.translationCN: 近年独立实验室检验企业有关新电池性能的说法。
examples.speakText: Independent laboratories test company claims about the performance of new batteries.

senses.meaningEN: an important topic or an edition of a publication
to officially give or announce something

d10-issue.usageNote: issue 可指待处理的问题、刊物一期；作动词表示正式发布或签发。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The debate focused on the issue of unequal access to education.
examples.translationCN: 辩论聚焦于教育机会不平等的问题。
examples.speakText: The debate focused on the issue of unequal access to education.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Justice became the central issue as the town watched the trial.
examples.translationCN: 全镇关注审判时，正义成了核心问题。
examples.speakText: Justice became the central issue as the town watched the trial.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Health agencies issue updated guidance when evidence about disease risks changes.
examples.translationCN: 疾病风险证据变化时，卫生机构会发布更新指南。
examples.speakText: Health agencies issue updated guidance when evidence about disease risks changes.

senses.meaningEN: to ask payment, accuse, or fill with electricity
a price or responsibility for someone

d10-charge.usageNote: charge someone for something 或 charge someone an amount 表示收费；charge someone with a crime 表示指控；in charge of 表示负责。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The laboratory does not charge students for basic materials.
examples.translationCN: 实验室不向学生收取基本材料费。
examples.speakText: The laboratory does not charge students for basic materials.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Javert remained in charge of the search for the escaped prisoner.
examples.translationCN: 沙威继续负责搜捕逃犯。
examples.speakText: Javert remained in charge of the search for the escaped prisoner.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Faster stations can charge many electric vehicles during a short stop.
examples.translationCN: 近年的快速充电站可在短暂停留期间为多辆电动汽车充电。
examples.speakText: Faster stations can charge many electric vehicles during a short stop.

senses.meaningEN: a worry or important matter
to relate to or worry someone

d10-concern.usageNote: be concerned about 是担忧；as far as X is concerned 表示就 X 而言。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Student safety is the university's main concern.
examples.translationCN: 学生安全是大学最关心的问题。
examples.speakText: Student safety is the university's main concern.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Mr Bennet's lack of concern frustrated his anxious wife.
examples.translationCN: 班纳特先生的漫不经心让焦虑的妻子十分沮丧。
examples.speakText: Mr Bennet's lack of concern frustrated his anxious wife.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: The spread of drug-resistant infections is a growing global concern.
examples.translationCN: 耐药性感染的传播是近年日益严重的全球关切。
examples.speakText: The spread of drug-resistant infections is a growing global concern.

senses.meaningEN: a number, person, or shape
to think or calculate

d10-figure.usageNote: figure out 表示弄清楚；figure 作名词可指数值、人物或图形。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The latest figures show a rise in library use.
examples.translationCN: 最新数字显示图书馆使用率有所上升。
examples.speakText: The latest figures show a rise in library use.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: A dark figure appeared at the edge of the moor.
examples.translationCN: 一个黑色身影出现在荒原边缘。
examples.speakText: A dark figure appeared at the edge of the moor.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Public figures increasingly label computer-generated images shared online.
examples.translationCN: 近年公众人物越来越多地标注网上分享的计算机生成图像。
examples.speakText: Public figures increasingly label computer-generated images shared online.

senses.meaningEN: a banking arrangement, record, or description
to explain or form a stated share

d10-account.usageNote: account for 可表示“解释原因”或“占据比例”；on account of 表示因为。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Online courses account for a third of the program's credits.
examples.translationCN: 在线课程占该项目学分的三分之一。
examples.speakText: Online courses account for a third of the program's credits.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Ishmael gave a detailed account of life aboard the whaling ship.
examples.translationCN: 以实玛利详细叙述了捕鲸船上的生活。
examples.speakText: Ishmael gave a detailed account of life aboard the whaling ship.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Renewable energy accounts for a growing share of new electricity capacity.
examples.translationCN: 近年可再生能源在新增发电能力中所占比例不断提高。
examples.speakText: Renewable energy accounts for a growing share of new electricity capacity.

senses.meaningEN: a location or formal speech
to deal with a problem or speak to someone

d10-address.usageNote: address a problem 是“处理问题”，不是只讨论问题。美式英语中名词常重读首音节 /ˈædres/，动词重读末音节 /əˈdres/。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The committee proposed three ways to address food waste.
examples.translationCN: 委员会提出了三种处理食物浪费的方法。
examples.speakText: The committee proposed three ways to address food waste.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The captain addressed the crew before they entered dangerous waters.
examples.translationCN: 进入危险水域前，船长向船员讲话。
examples.speakText: The captain addressed the crew before they entered dangerous waters.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Cities are planting shade trees to address rising urban heat.
examples.translationCN: 近年城市通过种植遮阴树木来应对不断上升的城市高温。
examples.speakText: Cities are planting shade trees to address rising urban heat.

senses.meaningEN: a way of dealing with something
to come near or begin dealing with

d10-approach.usageNote: approach 作动词直接接宾语，不说 approach to the station；名词常用 approach to。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The teacher used a practical approach to grammar.
examples.translationCN: 老师采用实用方法教授语法。
examples.speakText: The teacher used a practical approach to grammar.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: As the ship approached the island, Jim watched the shore carefully.
examples.translationCN: 船接近岛屿时，吉姆仔细观察海岸。
examples.speakText: As the ship approached the island, Jim watched the shore carefully.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Researchers use a combined approach to track climate risks and public health.
examples.translationCN: 近年研究人员采用综合方法追踪气候风险与公共健康。
examples.speakText: Researchers use a combined approach to track climate risks and public health.

senses.meaningEN: a thing, aim, or grammatical receiver of an action
to express opposition

d10-object.usageNote: 名词 object /ˈɒbdʒɪkt/；动词 object /əbˈdʒekt/，常用 object to doing。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Several residents objected to building a car park beside the school.
examples.translationCN: 几位居民反对在学校旁建停车场。
examples.speakText: Several residents objected to building a car park beside the school.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The mysterious object in the road made the traveller stop.
examples.translationCN: 路上的神秘物体使旅行者停下脚步。
examples.speakText: The mysterious object in the road made the traveller stop.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Astronomers track every known object that passes close to Earth.
examples.translationCN: 近年天文学家持续追踪每个已知的近地天体。
examples.speakText: Astronomers track every known object that passes close to Earth.

senses.meaningEN: a topic, field of study, or person being studied
dependent on or likely to experience
to cause someone to experience something

d10-subject.usageNote: 名词/形容词 subject /ˈsʌbdʒɪkt/；动词 subject /səbˈdʒekt/，重音后移。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The timetable is subject to change during the examination period.
examples.translationCN: 考试期间时间表可能会有变动。
examples.speakText: The timetable is subject to change during the examination period.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Revenge became the central subject of Hamlet's troubled thoughts.
examples.translationCN: 复仇成了哈姆雷特烦乱思绪的核心主题。
examples.speakText: Revenge became the central subject of Hamlet's troubled thoughts.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: High-risk artificial intelligence is subject to stricter rules in several jurisdictions.
examples.translationCN: 近年高风险人工智能在多个司法辖区受到更严格规则约束。
examples.speakText: High-risk artificial intelligence is subject to stricter rules in several jurisdictions.

senses.meaningEN: the way someone behaves
to organize, carry out, or lead

d10-conduct.usageNote: 名词 conduct /ˈkɒndʌkt/；动词 conduct /kənˈdʌkt/，重音后移。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The students conducted interviews for their social research project.
examples.translationCN: 学生为社会研究项目开展了访谈。
examples.speakText: The students conducted interviews for their social research project.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Darcy's conduct at the assembly shaped Elizabeth's first opinion of him.
examples.translationCN: 达西在舞会上的举止影响了伊丽莎白对他的第一印象。
examples.speakText: Darcy's conduct at the assembly shaped Elizabeth's first opinion of him.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: International teams conduct regular surveys of glaciers using satellites and aircraft.
examples.translationCN: 近年国际团队利用卫星和飞机定期开展冰川调查。
examples.speakText: International teams conduct regular surveys of glaciers using satellites and aircraft.

senses.meaningCN: 目前的；在场的；礼物；现在
senses.meaningEN: current, attending, a gift, or the current time
to show, introduce, or formally give

d10-present.usageNote: 形容词/名词 present /ˈpreznt/；动词 present /prɪˈzent/，动词重音后移。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Each group will present its findings at the end of the term.
examples.translationCN: 每组将在学期末展示研究结果。
examples.speakText: Each group will present its findings at the end of the term.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The Ghost of Christmas Present showed Scrooge the life around him.
examples.translationCN: 圣诞现在之灵向斯克鲁奇展示了他周围的生活。
examples.speakText: The Ghost of Christmas Present showed Scrooge the life around him.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Climate scientists present new observations at international assessment meetings.
examples.translationCN: 近年气候科学家在国际评估会议上展示新观测结果。
examples.speakText: Climate scientists present new observations at international assessment meetings.

senses.meaningEN: the material inside something or dealt with in a work
satisfied and willing to accept a situation

d10-content.usageNote: 名词 content /ˈkɒntent/；形容词 content /kənˈtent/，形容词重音后移。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The course content includes statistics and research ethics.
examples.translationCN: 课程内容包括统计学和研究伦理。
examples.speakText: The course content includes statistics and research ethics.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Heidi felt content with the simple life she shared with her grandfather.
examples.translationCN: 海蒂对与祖父共同度过的朴素生活感到满足。
examples.speakText: Heidi felt content with the simple life she shared with her grandfather.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Platforms increasingly label synthetic content created by generative artificial intelligence.
examples.translationCN: 近年平台越来越多地标注生成式人工智能制作的合成内容。
examples.speakText: Platforms increasingly label synthetic content created by generative artificial intelligence.

senses.meaningEN: a class, direction, series of events, or part of a meal

d10-course.usageNote: course of action 是行动方案；of course 表示当然；course 还可指一道菜。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: This course introduces students to environmental economics.
examples.translationCN: 这门课程向学生介绍环境经济学。
examples.speakText: This course introduces students to environmental economics.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The storm forced Odysseus to change the course of his ship.
examples.translationCN: 暴风雨迫使奥德修斯改变船的航线。
examples.speakText: The storm forced Odysseus to change the course of his ship.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: The course of battery development is changing transport and energy planning.
examples.translationCN: 近年电池发展的进程正在改变交通与能源规划。
examples.speakText: The course of battery development is changing transport and energy planning.

senses.meaningEN: a subject or physical substance
to be important

d10-matter.usageNote: matter 作不可数名词可指物质；作动词常用于 it matters。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Small details matter when you report experimental results.
examples.translationCN: 报告实验结果时，小细节很重要。
examples.speakText: Small details matter when you report experimental results.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: For the Little Prince, the time given to the rose was what mattered.
examples.translationCN: 对小王子而言，为玫瑰付出的时间才是重要的。
examples.speakText: For the Little Prince, the time given to the rose was what mattered.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Dark matter remains one of the largest unanswered questions in physics.
examples.translationCN: 近年暗物质仍是物理学中最大的未解问题之一。
examples.speakText: Dark matter remains one of the largest unanswered questions in physics.

senses.meaningEN: a method or available money and resources

d10-means.usageNote: means 单复数同形：a means / several means；by means of 表示借助。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: Email remains an efficient means of communication for the class.
examples.translationCN: 电子邮件仍是班级沟通的有效手段。
examples.speakText: Email remains an efficient means of communication for the class.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Robinson Crusoe used every available means to build a secure shelter.
examples.translationCN: 鲁滨孙利用一切可用手段建造安全住所。
examples.speakText: Robinson Crusoe used every available means to build a secure shelter.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Mobile payments provide a useful means of exchange in many rural markets.
examples.translationCN: 近年移动支付为许多农村市场提供了有用的交易手段。
examples.speakText: Mobile payments provide a useful means of exchange in many rural markets.

senses.meaningEN: to find size or judge degree
an action taken or an amount

d10-measure.usageNote: take measures to do 表示采取措施；measure 作动词可表示测量或衡量。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The survey measures changes in students' reading habits.
examples.translationCN: 该调查衡量学生阅读习惯的变化。
examples.speakText: The survey measures changes in students' reading habits.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The tailor carefully took the customer's measure before making the new coat.
examples.translationCN: 裁缝在制作新外套前仔细量了尺寸。
examples.speakText: The tailor carefully took the customer's measure before making the new coat.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: Cities are adopting measures to protect residents during extreme heat.
examples.translationCN: 近年城市正采取措施，在极端高温期间保护居民。
examples.speakText: Cities are adopting measures to protect residents during extreme heat.

senses.meaningEN: a level, speed, or price
to judge or assign a score

d10-rate.usageNote: at a rate of 表示以某速度或比率；rate A as B 表示把 A 评为 B。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The completion rate rose after the course was redesigned.
examples.translationCN: 课程重新设计后，完成率上升了。
examples.speakText: The completion rate rose after the course was redesigned.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: Scrooge rated profit above human kindness.
examples.translationCN: 斯克鲁奇对利润的看重超过了人情温暖。
examples.speakText: Scrooge rated profit above human kindness.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: The rate of electric-vehicle adoption differs widely between regions.
examples.translationCN: 近年不同地区采用电动汽车的速度差异很大。
examples.speakText: The rate of electric-vehicle adoption differs widely between regions.

senses.meaningEN: an area between limits or a variety
to vary between limits, arrange, or extend over an area

d10-range.usageNote: range from A to B 表示范围从 A 到 B；a range of 后接复数名词。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The library offers a wide range of digital resources.
examples.translationCN: 图书馆提供多种数字资源。
examples.speakText: The library offers a wide range of digital resources.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The hills ranged across the horizon beyond the travelers' path.
examples.translationCN: 群山绵延在旅行者道路之外的地平线上。
examples.speakText: The hills ranged across the horizon beyond the travelers' path.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: New satellite services support a range of uses from navigation to disaster response.
examples.translationCN: 近年的新型卫星服务支持从导航到灾害响应的多种用途。
examples.speakText: New satellite services support a range of uses from navigation to disaster response.

collocationNotes.cn: 范围从 A 到 B

senses.meaningEN: a word, period, or school session
to give a particular name to

d10-term.usageNote: in terms of 表示就……而言；term 作动词常用 be termed“被称为”。

examples.label: CET-4 Context
examples.text: The term has a different meaning in economics.
examples.translationCN: 这个术语在经济学中有不同含义。
examples.speakText: The term has a different meaning in economics.

examples.label: Literature
examples.text: The school term at Lowood demanded discipline from every pupil.
examples.translationCN: 洛伍德的学期要求每个学生严守纪律。
examples.speakText: The school term at Lowood demanded discipline from every pupil.

examples.label: World Now
examples.text: The term generative artificial intelligence has entered everyday discussion.
examples.translationCN: 近年“生成式人工智能”这一术语已进入日常讨论。
examples.speakText: The term generative artificial intelligence has entered everyday discussion.
